metadata.title: Edesio - The chatbot that trains and evaluates your students | AI education solution
metadata.description: Edesio: AI solution for schools. Teachers upload their lessons, the AI generates questions based on the content and trains students. Discover our innovative educational platform.

hero.badge: Middle schools, high schools and higher education
hero.title: the chatbot that trains and evaluates
hero.subtitle: Teachers upload their lessons, {brand} generates questions, chats with students and provides you with clear feedback on their progress.

functioning.title: A simple process in
functioning.subtitle: Transform your lessons into interactive learning experiences in just a few clicks.

steps.title: The teacher uploads their lessons
steps.description: Easily import your course materials: PDFs, Word documents, presentations. Edesio analyzes and understands the educational content.

steps.title: AI generates questions
steps.description: Our artificial intelligence analyzes the content and automatically creates relevant questions adapted to your students' level.

steps.title: The chatbot trains students
steps.description: Students revise by chatting with Edesio. The chatbot asks questions, corrects mistakes and explains concepts.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about {brand}.

items.question: How is my data and my students' data protected?
items.answer: Edesio strictly complies with GDPR. All data is hosted in Europe, on secure servers. We never use student data for commercial purposes. Institutions remain the owners of their data and can delete it at any time.

items.question: What is the teacher's role with Edesio?
items.answer: The teacher remains at the heart of the system. They upload their lessons, validate AI-generated questions if they wish, and consult student progress reports. Edesio is a support tool that frees up time for human guidance, without ever replacing the teacher.

items.question: How does the AI generate questions?
items.answer: Our AI analyzes the content of your lessons (PDFs, documents) and generates questions directly linked to your teaching. Each question is based on the material you provided, ensuring relevant revision aligned with your curriculum.

items.question: What types of institutions is Edesio designed for?
items.answer: Edesio is designed for middle schools, general, technological and vocational high schools, as well as higher education (vocational degrees, preparatory classes, schools). The platform adapts to all subjects and levels.

items.question: How does the technical setup work?
items.answer: Edesio is a SaaS solution accessible via a simple web browser. No installation is required. We support institutions in getting started with training sessions for teaching teams. Integration with your existing LMS is available on request.

items.question: Can students cheat with the chatbot?
items.answer: Edesio is designed for training, not summative assessment. The chatbot guides students toward the right answers rather than giving them directly. Teachers have access to conversation histories and can track each student's real progress.

footer.tagline: The AI solution that transforms your lessons into interactive learning experiences for your students. Designed for middle schools, high schools and higher education.
footer.mobileAppDesc: Install Edesio on your phone for quick access.

greetings: Hi! I'm Edesio, your revision assistant. Ready to learn together?
Hello! It's Edesio. I'm here to help you revise in a fun way!
Welcome! I'm Edesio and I'll guide you through your revision.
Hey! It's Edesio. Shall we revise together today?
correctAnswers: Perfect! You know this topic well!
Nice work! You're on the right track!
encouragementsAfterWrong: No worries, making mistakes is how we learn!
That's okay! The important thing is to understand.
It happens! Let's look at the correct answer together.
Hmm, not quite. But that's how we progress!
Almost! Let's see what the right answer was.
retryEncouragements: What do you think was the key element you missed?
Can you explain this concept in your own words?
What have you understood about this idea now?
How would you rephrase this concept?
afterRetryMessages: Great! Now you'll remember it. Let's keep going!
Perfect! This time it's locked in. Moving on!
Super! See, you got it. Next question!
startQuiz: Let's go! I've prepared {count} questions for you.
Great choice! Let's start with {count} questions. Are you ready?
Here we go! {count} questions are waiting for you.
Perfect! Here are {count} questions to test your knowledge.
cheatMessages: Nice try, but cheating won't help you learn!
chatbot.noQuestions: I don't have any questions for "{course}" yet. Ask your teacher to generate some!
chatbot.welcomeToClass:
Welcome to the {session} class.

There are no lessons available yet. Ask your teacher to add some!
chatbot.selectCourse: Welcome to the {session} class. Which lesson would you like to revise today?
chatbot.reflectionNext:
OK, let's move on.

For reference, the correct answer was: {answer}{explanation}

chatbot.completionGood: Excellent work! You've mastered this topic.
chatbot.completionMedium: Good effort! A little more practice and you'll have it.
chatbot.completionLow: Keep it up! Revision takes time — you'll get there.
chatbot.simulateExperience: Simulate the student experience for this lesson
